description: wdrozenia bazy relacyjnej w projekcie - wykonaj zadanie umieszczone w pliku jira1.md
title: wdrozenia bazy relacyjnej w projekcie - wykonaj zadanie umieszczone w pliku jira1.md

criteria.description: shared/schema.ts exports const users, projects, projectShares, files as Drizzle pgTable instances importable from drizzle-orm/pg-core
criteria.how_to_verify: Grep shared/schema.ts for `pgTable` — must appear exactly 4 times, once per table definition

criteria.description: shared/schema.ts defines all 5 required indexes: projects(ownerId), projectShares(userId), projectShares(projectId), files(projectId), files(ownerId)
criteria.how_to_verify: Grep shared/schema.ts for `index(` — must appear exactly 5 times

criteria.description: exported Project type includes sharedWith: string[] so that server/routes.ts lines 79, 89, 130, 133, 158 (project.sharedWith accesses) continue to type-check
criteria.how_to_verify: Run `npm run check` — zero TypeScript errors in server/routes.ts and server/fileStorage.ts

criteria.description: shared/schema.ts exports projectStateSchema as a Zod schema with fields: layers, objects, customIcons, exportSettings, autoNumbering, overlayOpacity, pdfFileId, overlayPdfFileId, activeLayerId
criteria.how_to_verify: Grep shared/schema.ts for `projectStateSchema` and verify it uses z.object with those 9 keys

criteria.description: shared/schema.ts exports insertUserSchema as a Zod schema accepting {username, password} (not passwordHash) for HTTP request validation
criteria.how_to_verify: Grep shared/schema.ts for `insertUserSchema` and verify it contains a `password` field (not passwordHash)

criteria.description: FileMetadata type is exported from shared/schema.ts and is derived from typeof files.$inferSelect
criteria.how_to_verify: Grep shared/schema.ts for `FileMetadata` — must be assigned as a type alias using `files.$inferSelect`

criteria.description: `npm run db:push` (drizzle-kit push) completes without error and creates all 4 tables in the target PostgreSQL database
criteria.how_to_verify: Run `npm run db:push` and check stdout shows tables users, projects, project_shares, files created; then verify via `psql -c '\dt'` or equivalent

criteria.description: `npm run check` (tsc) passes with zero type errors across the entire project after the schema change
criteria.how_to_verify: Run `npm run check` and confirm exit code 0 with no diagnostic output
